site.title: Outbound-Growth — Premium Sales Outsourcing & Consulting
site.description: Boutique international sales outsourcing and consulting. Managed SDR seats from South Africa for UK & US SaaS. Dashboard access, guaranteed process, measurable growth.

hero.headline: We provide world-class SDR teams for B2B companies that need predictable client acquisition.
hero.subheadline: We help SaaS, cybersecurity, fintech, and other B2B companies generate qualified meetings with full visibility and control.

services.title: Managed SDR Seat
features: Dedicated, fully trained SDR focused only on your pipeline
All sales software included (HubSpot, Zoho, Apollo, JustCall)
1x targeted email campaign per month (≈ 2,500 contacts)
1,400+ targeted touchpoints per month (50 calls + 15 personalized emails + 5 LinkedIn connection requests or inboxes per day)
Calendar handoff — demos booked directly into your AE's schedule

services.title: Simple & Seamless Management
features: Weekly performance reports with full transparency on activity and outcomes
Dedicated Slack channel for direct communication with your SDR and manager
Seamless coverage when your SDR is away
All HR, hiring, contracts, payroll, tax, and benefits handled by Outbound-Growth

services.title: The Results That Drive Growth
features: Consistent flow of qualified demos delivered straight to your sales team
Reduced cost of acquisition compared to building and managing an in-house SDR function
Faster pipeline growth, with outbound channels running at full speed from day one
Peace of mind knowing your SDR team scales with you, without the HR or operational headaches

process.title: The Process
process.subtitle: How we transform your sales pipeline in 5 simple steps

steps.title: Consultation & Discovery
steps.description: 30-minute consultation to explore your business and recommend the best package.

steps.title: Building the Solution
steps.description: Handpick SDRs, define KPIs, start AI-assisted Hyperbound training.

steps.title: Setup & Integration
steps.description: Setup HubSpot, Apollo, JustCall; provide secure dashboard access.

steps.title: Communication & Alignment
steps.description: Slack channel and weekly check-ins to keep everyone aligned.

steps.title: SDR Launch & Tracking
steps.description: SDR goes live; interactive dashboard and full transparency from day one.

testimonials.quote: Outbound-Growth transformed our outbound motion. Their SDRs were trained, professional and delivered a reliable flow of qualified demos into our sales team.
testimonials.author: Client Partner
testimonials.title: VP Sales, Global SaaS

testimonials.quote: Their dashboard and transparency made it easy for us to monitor progress and trust the process. We scaled from 1 to 3 SDR seats in under 3 months.
testimonials.author: Client Partner
testimonials.title: Head of Growth, Enterprise SaaS
